<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what actually happened -->

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem -->

## 🖥️ Environment
**Desktop:**
- OS: [e.g., macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox]
- Version: [e.g., 22]

**Mobile:**
- Device: [e.g., iPhone 12, Samsung Galaxy]
- OS: [e.g., iOS 15, Android 11]
- Browser: [e.g., Safari, Chrome]
- Version: [e.g., 22]

**Development Environment:**
- Python Version: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- Node.js Version: [e.g., 18.17.0]
- Django Version: [e.g., 4.2.7]
- React Version: [e.g., 18.2.0]

<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->

**Browser Console Errors:**
```
Paste any browser console errors here

**Backend Logs:**
```
Paste any relevant backend error logs here

## 🧪 Attempted Solutions
<!-- What have you tried to fix this issue? -->
- [ ] Cleared browser cache
- [ ] Tried different browser
- [ ] Restarted development server
- [ ] Checked network connectivity

## 🚨 Priority
- [ ] Low - Cosmetic issue, workaround available
- [ ] Medium - Affects functionality but workaround exists  
- [ ] High - Blocks functionality, no workaround
- [ ] Critical - Breaks core functionality, affects users

## 🏷️ Component
<!-- Which part of the application is affected? -->
- [ ] Frontend (React)
- [ ] Backend (Django API)
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___________
